description: Canonical scenario registry for deterministic facade detector regression.

focus: upper-right facade contour should follow the eave, not right-edge noise
facade lower cutoff should stop exactly at socle top
socle should reach the left bottom edge and follow terrain variation
central cluster must remain window + door + window
recover the double brown door cluster
recover the central door with adjacent sidelights/windows
keep the merged stepped facade body instead of collapsing to the lower band

scenarios.raw_path: detector cantitati/raw/2 imagini pe fundal alb 2 imagini pe fundal negru/MARGINEAN ANA_colorized_fatada_dreapta.png
scenarios.processed_reference_path: detector cantitati/procesate/2 imagini pe fundal alb 2 imagini pe fundal negru/MARGINEAN ANA_colorized_fatada_dreapta_procesat.png
focus: complete the full gable body through the bright/white gap
do not stop the facade at the white transition
keep zero false openings in the lower-right dark region

scenarios.raw_path: detector cantitati/raw/2 imagini pe fundal alb 2 imagini pe fundal negru/MUNTEAN LUCRETIA_colorized_fatada_stanga.png
scenarios.processed_reference_path: detector cantitati/procesate/2 imagini pe fundal alb 2 imagini pe fundal negru/MUNTEAN LUCRETIA_colorized_fatada_stanga_procesat.png

suppress fake door + sidelight pair on the right
include the right-side attachment in the final silhouette
